problem_framing.quote: I never know which documents are right until they get rejected.
problem_framing.description: Incomplete submissions mean rejections, delays, and costly resubmissions.

problem_framing.quote: I missed the BRELA return deadline again.
problem_framing.description: Deadline surprises lead to penalties and compliance risks you could have avoided.

faq.question: Do I need to visit any office in person?
faq.answer: No. We file everything electronically and keep you updated via WhatsApp. Our team liaises with all regulators - BRELA, TRA, NSSF, WCF, OSHA - on your behalf.

faq.question: How long does company registration take?
faq.answer: Typically 5–10 business days from when we receive your complete documents. Delays can occur if BRELA requests additional information, but we follow up proactively.

faq.question: What documents do I need to get started?
faq.answer: It depends on the service. For company registration, you'll need director details, a proposed company name, and a registered office address. We'll send you a clear checklist after your consultation.

faq.question: Can I track my consultation status?
faq.answer: Yes - every engagement gets a 6-character tracking code. Enter it on our Track Your Consultation page for an instant status check. No login required.

faq.question: What's included in the compliance reminders?
faq.answer: We track all major compliance deadlines - BRELA returns, TRA filings, WCF, NSSF, OSHA renewals - and send you advance reminders via WhatsApp. No time limit, no cut-off.

faq.question: Do you handle work permits for foreign employees?
faq.answer: Yes. We process work permits, residence permits, and TIC/TISEZA registration for foreign investors and employees. Everything is handled remotely - no office visits needed.

faq.question: What are your service fees?
faq.answer: Fees vary by service. Company registration starts from TZS 350,000. We provide a clear quote before any work begins - no hidden charges, no surprises.

faq.question: What happens after I submit an inquiry?
faq.answer: You'll receive a tracking code via WhatsApp within one business day. Use it to check your status anytime. We also send milestone updates automatically.
